## Runtime.RuntimeRecipe.scaleByFactor() method

Scales by a multiplicative factor.

**Signature:**

```typescript
scaleByFactor(factor: number, options?: IRecipeScaleOptions): Result<IRuntimeScaledRecipeVersion>;
```
